description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, half buttoned placket, an adjustable button tab on the left shoulder, a patch pocket with a flap and button closure on the right chestFitRegular  Wash care Machine wash with warm water using a non chlorine bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsDo not dry cleanNothing exudes class and elegance as much as an s.oliver t-shirt. Wear this classic style to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair it with classic denims, a jacket and casual shoes to snazz up your style.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
